name: Troy Resources Limited
description: Troy Resources Limited is an Australia-based junior gold producer primarily focused on the exploration and development of mineral projects. The company has historically operated the Karouni gold project located in Guyana, South America. With a long track record in mine development, low-cost operations, and strategic exploration, Troy Resources has managed various gold and silver assets across South America. The company is committed to maintaining high standards of health, safety, environmental stewardship, and social responsibility throughout its mining operations and exploration activities.
